title: DG K8s SRE Dashboard Report
description: Runs all Kubernetes SRE dashboard tile queries, analyzes each with Dynatrace Intelligence, and emails a consolidated report.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_CLUSTER | summarize cluster_count = count()

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Total Clusters
input.instruction: Provide a concise analysis with key observations and any recommendations. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NODE | summarize node_count = count()

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Total Nodes
input.instruction: Provide a concise analysis with key observations and any recommendations. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_POD | summarize pod_count = count()

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Total Pods
input.instruction: Provide a concise analysis with key observations and any recommendations. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd total = arraySum(restarts) | summarize total_restarts = sum(total)

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Container Restarts
input.instruction: Provide a concise analysis with key observations. Flag if restart count seems abnormal. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries oom = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.oom_kills), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd total = arraySum(oom) | summarize total_oom_kills = sum(total)

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## OOM Kills
input.instruction: Provide a concise analysis. Flag if any OOM kills are present — these are critical. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries cpu = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd avg_cpu = arrayAvg(cpu) | fields k8s.cluster.name, avg_cpu | sort avg_cpu desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## CPU Usage by Cluster
input.instruction: Identify clusters with highest CPU usage. Flag any that seem over-utilized. Format as markdown table and analysis.

input.query: timeseries mem = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.memory_working_set), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd avg_mem = arrayAvg(mem) | fields k8s.cluster.name, avg_mem | sort avg_mem desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Memory Usage by Cluster
input.instruction: Identify clusters with highest memory usage. Flag any that seem over-utilized or at risk of OOM. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd total_restarts = arraySum(restarts) | fields k8s.cluster.name, total_restarts | filter total_restarts > 0 | sort total_restarts desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Container Restarts by Cluster
input.instruction: Identify which clusters have the most restarts and flag any that seem abnormally high. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries oom = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.oom_kills), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd total_oom = arraySum(oom) | fields k8s.cluster.name, total_oom | filter total_oom > 0 | sort total_oom desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## OOM Kills by Cluster
input.instruction: Identify affected clusters and assess severity. OOM kills indicate memory limits need adjusting. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_DEPLOYMENT | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | fieldsAdd desired = config[`spec`][`replicas`], ready = config[`status`][`readyReplicas`], available = config[`status`][`availableReplicas`] | filter isNotNull(desired) and desired > 0 and (isNull(ready) or ready < desired) | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.workload.name, desired, ready, available | sort k8s.cluster.name asc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Degraded Deployments
input.instruction: List each degraded deployment with its cluster and namespace. Assess impact severity. Recommend remediation steps. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_DEPLOYMENT | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | expand condition = config[`status`][`conditions`] | fieldsAdd cond_type = condition[`type`], cond_reason = condition[`reason`], cond_message = condition[`message`] | filter cond_type == "Progressing" and cond_reason == "ProgressDeadlineExceeded" | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.workload.name, cond_message

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Stuck Rollouts
input.instruction: Identify stuck deployments and their clusters. Explain common causes (bad image, quota, probe failures). Recommend immediate actions. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_POD | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | fieldsAdd phase = config[`status`][`phase`] | filter phase != "Running" and phase != "Succeeded" | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase | sort k8s.cluster.name asc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Pods Not Running
input.instruction: Group by phase (Pending, Failed, Unknown). Identify patterns (same namespace, same cluster). Recommend investigation steps. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts), by: {k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd total_restarts = arraySum(restarts) | filter total_restarts > 0 | sort total_restarts desc | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, total_restarts | limit 20

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Top Restarting Pods
input.instruction: Identify the worst offenders and patterns. Are restarts concentrated in specific clusters or namespaces? Recommend investigation priority. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NODE | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | expand condition = config[`status`][`conditions`] | fieldsAdd cond_type = condition[`type`], cond_status = condition[`status`], message = condition[`message`] | filter (cond_type == "Ready" and cond_status != "True") or (in(cond_type, array("MemoryPressure","DiskPressure","PIDPressure")) and cond_status == "True") | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, cond_type, cond_status, message

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Unhealthy Nodes
input.instruction: Identify nodes with NotReady, MemoryPressure, DiskPressure, or PIDPressure. Assess blast radius. Recommend immediate actions. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NODE | summarize node_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | sort node_count desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Node Count by Cluster
input.instruction: Assess node distribution. Identify clusters that may be undersized or oversized. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries { throttled = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_throttled), limit_cpu = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.limits_cpu), usage = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage) }, by: {k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd throttle_pct = if(arrayAvg(limit_cpu) > 0, (arrayAvg(throttled) / arrayAvg(limit_cpu)) * 100, else: 0) | filter throttle_pct > 25 | sort throttle_pct desc | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, throttle_pct | limit 20

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## CPU Throttled Containers
input.instruction: Identify the worst throttled containers and their clusters. High throttling causes latency. Recommend CPU limit adjustments. Format as markdown.

input.query: timeseries throttled = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_throttled), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | fieldsAdd avg_throttled = arrayAvg(throttled) | fields k8s.cluster.name, avg_throttled | sort avg_throttled desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## CPU Throttling Trend
input.instruction: Identify clusters with the highest average throttling. Assess trends. Format as markdown.

input.query: fetch logs | filter isNotNull(k8s.namespace.name) and loglevel == "ERROR" | summarize error_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name} | sort error_count desc | limit 20

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Error Logs by Namespace
input.instruction: Identify namespaces with the highest error counts. Flag any that seem abnormally high. Recommend investigation priorities. Format as markdown.

input.query: fetch logs | filter isNotNull(k8s.namespace.name) and loglevel == "ERROR" | summarize error_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | sort error_count desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## K8s Error Log Trend
input.instruction: Identify clusters with the most errors. Assess whether error volumes are concerning. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_POD | summarize pod_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | sort pod_count desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Pods by Cluster
input.instruction: Assess pod distribution balance. Identify clusters that are heavily loaded. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_DEPLOYMENT, K8S_STATEFULSET, K8S_DAEMONSET | summarize workload_count = count(), by: {k8s.workload.kind} | sort workload_count desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Workloads by Type
input.instruction: Assess workload composition (Deployments vs StatefulSets vs DaemonSets). Provide observations. Format as markdown.

input.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NAMESPACE | summarize ns_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | sort ns_count desc

input.prompt:
Provide a brief SRE assessment:
## Namespaces per Cluster
input.instruction: Assess namespace distribution. Identify clusters with high namespace counts. Format as markdown.

email_k8s_report.name: email_k8s_report
email_k8s_report.description: Send consolidated K8s SRE report email

input.subject: Dollar General - Kubernetes SRE Report
